caption: Respond to a property possession claim
title: Contact preference
content:
Important documents like orders will always be sent by post.

You can choose whether case updates should be sent to you by post or email while you are acting for your client. For example, when a hearing has been scheduled or a document is ready to view online.

labels.question: How should you receive updates while acting for your client?

errors.contactByEmailOrPost: Select how you should receive updates while acting for your client
errors.contactByEmailOrPost.email.invalid: Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
